nameMeanings.name: Powtrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Powdrill
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Nottinghamshire; of Norman origin): nickname from Anglo-Norman French poutrel, putrel ‘colt, horse’ (medieval Latin pultrellus), probably denoting one of a lively or frisky disposition.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Powtrell was born in 1145. She married Richard Powtrell in 1160, in Thrumpton, Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Powtrell est née en 1145. Elle a épousé Richard Powtrell en 1160, à Thrumpton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Powtrell wurde 1145 geboren. Sie hat 1160 in Thrumpton, Nottinghamshire, England Richard Powtrell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Powtrell è nata il nel 1145. Lei sposato Richard Powtrell nel 1160, nel Thrumpton, Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.Thrumpton, Nottinghamshire, England: イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスルンプトン
ja.Thrumpton Hall, Nottingham, Nottingham,: イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアノッティンガム
ja.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Powtrellは1145年に生まれた。1160年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスルンプトンでRichard Powtrellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Powtrell(은)는 1145년 태어났다. 그녀는 1160년 영국 노틴그함실르 스럼프턴에서 Richard Powtrell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Powtrell nasceu em 1145. Ela casou-se com Richard Powtrell em 1160, em Thrumpton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Powtrell родилась в 1145 г. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Powtrell в 1160 г. в местности трумптон, ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs. Richard Powtrell nació en 1145. Se casó con Richard Powtrell en 1160, en Thrumpton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
